slice_name: Tag a time entry with a label

composition.lld_notes: Framework: Django (carried from slice build-record lld_notes — not re-picked). Skeleton F1 routes + F4 project routes inherited by reference — not edited (H14/B4). Feature-add wires the new C4 (Time Logging) into the EXISTING system at the declared INTEGRATION_SEAMS only (BF6): additive composition file web_ingress/time_logging_dispatch.py (1) adds path('time-entries/<id>/label') urlpattern + _view_set_label Django view (MPA/SSR, ADR-0004) routing into C6 ingress at the CT9 seam — a NEW additive route, no existing web_ingress code edited; (2) composes SessionResolver(CT3, existing C2) to gate the request (reuses the baseline session pattern); (3) calls C4.set_label which persists the label field on the time-entry record via existing C1 at the CT2 seam (the aPRD INTEGRATION_SEAMS primary seam — CT2 EXTENSION, no new contract, C1 internals untouched). existing_internals_modified=false — additive wiring only; no C1/C2/C6 internal logic edited. Same routing/session/error patterns the baseline uses (BF5). Synchronous, no async/queue (INV6).

mock_swaps.detail: C6 ingress dispatch to the new C4 added via additive time_logging_dispatch.py (_view_set_label + path('time-entries/<id>/label')). No existing web_ingress component file edited (additive route only). Both C6 (prior-built, status:green) and C4 (this-slice, status:green) on path.

New C4 resolves the freelancer session via existing C2 at the CT3 seam (reuses the baseline session pattern, BF5). mock_identity_auth in the frozen slice conftest provides resolve_session; real wiring composes existing C2 SessionResolver — C2 internals untouched. Both C4 (status:green) and C2 (prior-built, status:green) on path.

C4 set_label persists the label field on the time-entry record via existing C1 at the CT2 seam — the aPRD INTEGRATION_SEAMS primary seam (CT2 EXTENSION, A14: new label field on the existing record, no new contract). mock_data_store in the frozen slice conftest provides the CT2 surface; real wiring delegates to existing C1 data store — C1 internals untouched. Both C4 (status:green) and C1 (prior-built, status:green) on path.

assertions.trace: _view_set_label routes time-entries/<id>/label POST -> resolves session via mock_identity_auth.resolve_session({session_token:'sess-f5-valid'}) -> {'freelancer_id':'freelancer-42'}; calls C4.set_label(entry_id, label='client-acme') -> delegates to mock_data_store CT2 label surface -> returns persisted record {'id':'te-1','label':'client-acme'}; view returns {'status':200,'entry':record}; set_response['status']=200 in (200,201,302) = True

assertions.assert: any(e['id'] == 'te-1' and e['label'] == 'client-acme' for e in list_response.get('entries', []))
assertions.trace: list view return_value entries=[{'id':'te-1','label':'client-acme'}]; the persisted label field renders on the entry in the list; any(...) = True

second read after navigate-away: mock_data_store returns the same record {'id':'te-1','label':'client-acme'}; label field still holds the value and stays linked to the same time entry (AC13); both equalities hold = True

failure.arrives_at: C1 raises StoreUnavailableError on label persist; C4 propagates it unmodified (does not swallow); Web Ingress surfaces the persistence error as an HTTP error; the label is not persisted

assertions.trace: mock_data_store label-persist side_effect=StoreUnavailableError; C4.set_label propagates it unmodified (baseline propagate-not-catch idiom); _view_set_label surfaces it as {'status':503}; response['status']=503 in (500,503) = True

assertions.assert: not any(e.get('label') == 'client-acme' for e in list_after_failure.get('entries', []))
assertions.trace: StoreUnavailableError raised before the record is written; subsequent list contains no entry with label 'client-acme'; any(...) = False; not False = True

verification.static_trace_notes: No pytest runtime in build harness (Rule 6, §5.7). Static trace of all flow assertions: Happy path — _view_set_label resolves session via existing C2 (CT3), calls C4.set_label which persists the label field via existing C1 (CT2 extension); set_response['status']=200 holds; label renders in the list (AC11) holds; label still holds the value on reload, linked to the same entry (AC13) holds. Failure path — mock_data_store label persist raises StoreUnavailableError; C4 propagates unmodified; _view_set_label surfaces {status:503}; response['status']=503 in (500,503) holds; label-not-persisted holds. All 5 assertions pass by construction against the wired path; new component wired into existing C6/C2/C1 at the declared INTEGRATION_SEAMS via additive time_logging_dispatch.py only — existing_internals_modified=false. Authoritative execution owed to VERIFY-OUTPUT (which also runs the scoped regression layer).

commits.message: INTEGRATE F5: wire C4 Time Logging into existing system at declared seams CT9/CT3/CT2 (additive label dispatch + session-gated persistence; existing internals untouched)
